name: QA 9000
description:
PCP QA Test No. 9000

If systemd is in the mix, check systemctl status for all PCP

units.



Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2604-container reproduce
